an4.43:1.1: "Cattārome, bhikkhave, puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmiṁ. Katame cattāro? Kodhagaru na saddhammagaru, makkhagaru na saddhammagaru, lābhagaru na saddhammagaru, sakkāragaru na saddhammagaru. Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmiṁ.
an4.43:1.2: Cattārome, bhikkhave, puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmiṁ. Katame cattāro? Saddhammagaru na kodhagaru, saddhammagaru na makkhagaru, saddhammagaru na lābhagaru, saddhammagaru na sakkāragaru. Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasminti.
an4.43:1.3:
Kodhamakkhagarū bhikkhū,
lābhasakkāragāravā;
Na te dhamme virūhanti,
sammāsambuddhadesite.
an4.43:1.4:
Ye ca saddhammagaruno,
vihaṁsu viharanti ca;
Te ve dhamme virūhanti,
sammāsambuddhadesite"ti.
Tatiyaṁ.
